property.name: javax.jdo.option.ConnectionURL
property.description: JDBC connect string for a JDBC metastore

property.name: javax.jdo.option.ConnectionDriverName
property.description: Driver class name for a JDBC metastore

property.name: javax.jdo.option.ConnectionUserName
property.description: username to use against metastore database

property.name: javax.jdo.option.ConnectionPassword
property.description: password to use against metastore database

property.name: hive.metastore.uris
property.description: Thrift URI for the remote metastore. Used by Hive clients (like HS2) to contact Metastore.

property.name: hive.metastore.warehouse.dir
property.description: location of default database for the warehouse

property.name: hive.server2.thrift.bind.host
property.description: Bind host on which HiveServer2 Thrift service will run.

property.name: hive.server2.thrift.port
property.description: Port number of HiveServer2 Thrift interface.

property.name: hive.server2.webui.host
property.description: The host address the HiveServer2 WebUI listens on.

property.name: hive.server2.webui.port
property.description: The port the HiveServer2 WebUI listens on.

property.name: hive.support.concurrency
property.description: Whether Hive supports concurrency control. Required for ACID transactions.

property.name: hive.txn.manager
property.description: Transaction manager to use. Required for ACID transactions.

property.name: hive.compactor.initiator.on
property.description: Whether to run the initiator thread for compacting transactions.

property.name: hive.compactor.worker.threads
property.description: The number of compacting worker threads.

property.name: hive.exec.dynamic.partition
property.description: Whether or not to allow dynamic partition inserts.

property.name: hive.exec.dynamic.partition.mode
property.description: In nonstrict mode, all partitions can be dynamic. In strict mode, at least one must be static.

property.name: hive.metastore.event.db.notification.api.auth
property.description: Disable db notification authorization checks for simplified cluster setup.

property.name: hive.server2.enable.doAs
property.description: Setting doAs to false tells HiveServer2 to execute HDFS commands under the hive user identity, rather than impersonating the client user, simplifying permission management on HDFS in dev.
